case_title: DANNY PATEL VS. GRACIE BADIE et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DANNY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BADIE, GRACIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3161 16TH ST. #312, S.F. CA. 94103, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DANNY AS TO DEFENDANT BADIE, GRACIE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT BADIE, GRACIE
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DANNY SERVED DEC-13-2006, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BADIE, GRACIE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BADIE, GRACIE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $18.90 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DANNY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BADIE, GRACIE
